title: 6PC Complete Hook and Pick Precision Automotive Tool Set Puller Removers
description:
The ToolTreaux 6pc hook and pick set comes with 6 different types of hooks and picks including a straight, hook, complex, 90 degree, combination, and double angle. These tools are ideal for pulling clips, wires, gaskets, and other small parts during automotive repair. Each hook and pick features an ergonomic grip handle that is made of non-slip rubber that will help prevent slippage during use, assuring precision control and keeping your hands safe. These hooks and picks are made of 40 HRC high carbon steel that won’t rust so you can count on them for years to come. The sturdy design will ensure that they will maintain their sharpness even after many uses. Each hook and pick measures 9.25” in length, making them a great size for hard-to-reach spots

6PC Complete Hook and Pick Precision Automotive Tool Set Puller Removers

The ToolTreaux 6pc hook and pick set comes with 6 different types of hooks and picks including a straight, hook, complex, 90 degree, combination, and double angle. These tools are ideal for pulling clips, wires, gaskets, and other small parts during automotive repair.

Key Features

  • VERSATILE HOOK AND PICK SET - The ToolTreaux 6pc hook and pick set comes with 6 different types of hooks and picks including a straight, hook, complex, 90 degree, combination, and double angle. These tools are ideal for pulling clips, wires, gaskets, and other small parts during automotive repair.
  • ERGONOMIC HANDLES - Each hook and pick features an ergonomic grip handle that is made of non-slip rubber that will help prevent slippage during use, assuring precision control and keeping your hands safe.
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - These hooks and picks are made of 40 HRC high carbon steel that won’t rust so you can count on them for years to come. The sturdy design will ensure that they will maintain their sharpness even after many uses.
  • EXTENDED LENGTH FOR EASE OF USE - Each hook and pick measures 9.25” in length, making them a great size for hard-to-reach spots. Although these are intended for automotive repair, they are also great tools for other precision work like jewelry making, and industrial and hobby craft use.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: 40 HRC high carbon steel; Colors; red and black: Pack size: 6; Tools included: straight, hook, complex, 9 degree, combination and double angle; Length: 9.25”; Handle type: soft-grip ergonomic
